Acrimony (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $43,549,096Details
International Box Office $3,078,740
Worldwide Box Office $46,627,836
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,417,154
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,370,154
Total $8,787,308
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A faithful wife tired of standing by her devious husband is enraged when it becomes clear she has been betrayed.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,170,707 (39.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.54 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,006 opening theaters/2,006 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $57,173,130

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 30th, 2018 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: March 29th, 2018 (Wide) (South Africa)
March 29th, 2018 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
March 29th, 2018 (Wide) (Aruba)
March 29th, 2018 (Wide) (Curacao)
March 29th, 2018 (Wide) (Jordan)
Video Release: June 12th, 2018 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language, sexual content and some violence.
(Rating bulletin 2484 (Cert #51136), 7/12/2017)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Plot point: African Americans, Infidelity, Inventor, Money Troubles, Rags to Riches, Relationships Gone Wrong, Revenge
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Tyler Perry Studios, Lionsgate
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
